scene: ONE 16:9 layout sheet. TOP = flat vector diagrams only. BOTTOM = eight LIVE-ACTION cinematic environment frames (empty set, before cast walks in). Bluff rim notch, drowned city basin. For Seedance @Image 2.

reference_images.purpose: CINEMATIC LOOK + COLOR — from operator's best photoreal Higgsfield still
reference_images.extract: Live-action film still quality: natural lighting, anamorphic depth, atmospheric haze, teal storm grade (#3A5660 sky, #2E5058 water, #C9A656 amber city lights). Real wet surfaces, real scale.
reference_images.apply_to: photoreal rendering style of bottom panels D–K only
reference_images.do_not_extract: character, yellow dress, bridge, exact composition copy, illustration style

blend_instructions: Bottom panels must look like FRAMES FROM A SHOT FEATURE — not concept art, not a video game, not a design board render. Image 1 = cinematic look + grade only. One photograph per cell D–K.

cinematic_photoreal.mandatory_look: live-action photorealistic cinema — indistinguishable from ARRI Alexa 65 location scout stills
cinematic_photoreal.camera: ARRI Alexa 65, Cooke Anamorphic/i 2x, 35mm and 50mm lenses, T2.8, 2.39:1 anamorphic framing inside each bottom cell
cinematic_photoreal.lighting: naturalistic night exteriors — motivated city glow, soft storm ambient, one restrained lightning fill where noted; Roger Deakins / Denis Villeneuve scale and restraint
cinematic_photoreal.atmosphere: real volumetric fog and rain haze — soft optical depth, NOT painted mist, NOT CG smoke cards
cinematic_photoreal.surfaces: real wet bark, real water physics, real building materials — subsurface on wood, specular on water
cinematic_photoreal.depth_of_field: cinematic shallow DOF on foreground elements; city remains readable in background bokeh

texture.grain: clean in-camera digital capture — no added film grain, no speckle noise
texture.rain: real optical rain in air — soft streaks, sparse, photographed not painted dots
texture.water: photographed turbulent river at cinema scale — wide shots, NOT macro foam abstract
texture.macro_forbidden: NO extreme close-up rock texture, NO splash macro, NO pore-level surface noise

color_grade.luminance_rule: 40%+ midtone teal per panel. Never crush to black.

layout_strict.top_band: flat 2D vector diagrams ONLY — simple line art, NOT photoreal
layout_strict.bottom_band: 8 photoreal cinematic frames ONLY — 2 rows × 4 columns D E F G / H I J K

top_diagrams.label: MAP TOP-DOWN
top_diagrams.description: Flat vector map: rim forest, trail end notch, single storm tree at cliff edge, wide drowned city basin, river arrow. NOT a bridge.

top_diagrams.label: CROSS-SECTION
top_diagrams.description: Flat vector side cut: cliff, undercut, 30ft+ drop, submerged buildings.

top_diagrams.label: STORY FLOW
top_diagrams.description: Simple icon strip — environment beats only, no stick-figure people: woods → notch → city → give-way → suspended → release → surface → underwater debris current

panels.label: RIM WOODS
panels.shot: Wide Steadicam forest path — towering wet conifers, muddy trail, storm mist. Live-action Pacific Northwest night forest. Medium-wide NOT illustration.

panels.label: NOTCH
panels.shot: Epic wide vista from cliff edge — vast drowned city glowing amber #C9A656 far below, teal sky #3A5660. Empty set. Blade Runner 2049 flood scale. NO bridge.

panels.label: CITY REVEAL
panels.shot: High wide anamorphic over flooded downtown — submerged towers, rapids #2E5058, warm windows. Photographed practical scale.

panels.label: GIVE-WAY
panels.shot: Medium-wide crumbling cliff lip, storm tree tilting — live-action disaster geology, wet bark #4A3828. NOT game asset.

panels.label: SUSPENDED ANGLE
panels.shot: Low anamorphic hero angle — storm tree against city glow, dramatic sky. Cinema trailer frame.

panels.label: RELEASE ANGLE
panels.shot: Medium-wide cliff edge and wet tree trunk — NOT macro rock close-up. Lightning flash #D8ECE8 on wood. Empty set.

panels.label: ABOVE WATER
panels.shot: Wide cinema river through urban wreckage — whitecaps #D8ECE8, full environment scale. NOT macro splash.

panels.label: UNDERWATER
panels.shot: Wide anamorphic underwater empty set — STRONG CURRENT, not calm. Cars and wreckage dragged through murky teal #256068. Submerged buildings, timber, rebar in flow. God rays #D8ECE8 from surface above. Turbulent debris train — NOT still pool, NOT peaceful blue. No swimmer.

must_include: bottom row looks like live-action film frames

note: If sheet still looks like concept art, use nano-banana-environment-plate-single.json — one cinematic 16:9 still per file, stitch in Photoshop.
